title: gaultheria urdanetensis
intro: Gaultheria urdanetensis is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae, native to the Philippines. It is a shrub that produces small white flowers and red berries, and is also known as the Philippine Gaultheria or Urdaneta Gaultheria. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Herbal preparations of Gaultheria urdanetensis, such as infusions and decoctions, are believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health.
